---
title: Second Brain Architecture
type: concept
status: developing
tags: [second-brain, knowledge-graph, rag]
created: 2026-01-01
updated: 2026-06-01
---

A second brain is a personal knowledge management system that stores ideas, notes, and
connections so you can offload memory to an external system.

Key components:
- Capture (inbox)
- Organise (folders/tags)
- Distil (summaries)
- Express (output)

Related: [[Knowledge Graph Viz]] · [[RAG Lesson]]

#ai #second-brain
